description_long: This is a classic Camiva Berliet fire truck, painted in a bright red color with silver and gray accents. The vehicle features a large, boxy body with multiple side compartments for equipment storage, and a prominent ladder mounted on the roof. Blue emergency lights are positioned on the roof, and the front displays the Camiva and Berliet branding along with a license plate. The rear of the truck is equipped with hose reels, visible mechanical components, and additional storage. The cab has four doors, with fire department insignia and text on the side. The truck is built primarily from metal, with glass windows and rubber tires, and is designed for rapid response in urban environments.
description: A red Camiva Berliet fire truck with roof-mounted ladder, blue emergency lights, hose reels, and fire department insignia. It features multiple storage compartments and robust construction for emergency response.
description_view_0: Front view showing the windshield, Camiva and Berliet branding, blue emergency lights, and license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cab doors, fire department insignia, side compartments, and the full length of the roof ladder.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying hose reels, mechanical components, and the end of the roof ladder.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cab, side compartments, and the ladder on the roof, similar to the left but without visible insignia.
